body_txt: It's an old standby: the hero has done their absolute best, saved everyone he possibly could...but not everyone. Someone died, nearly always in a way completely outside the hero's control . They went above and beyond the call of duty, but it wasn't enough. Can lead to Training from Hell , Heroic BSoD , and, in rare cases, Jumping Off the Slippery Slope . See also Chronic Hero Syndrome and Samaritan Syndrome . Friends will often respond with, " You Did Everything You Could ." Related to Guilt Complex or My Greatest Failure .
